seo.title: Workout Pro | CrossFit Gym in Simpsonville, SC
seo.description: Workout Pro in Simpsonville, SC offers CrossFit group classes, Foundations training, and personal training for all fitness levels. Schedule your free No-Sweat Intro today.

lead_magnet.headline: Get a Free Week of Classes at Workout Pro

review_request.prompt_text: Loving your results at Workout Pro? Leave us a quick Google review and help other Simpsonville residents find their fitness community.

services.title: CrossFit Group Classes
services.description: Coach-led 60-minute group classes built around constantly varied functional movements. Every workout is scalable to any fitness level, so beginners and athletes train side by side.

services.title: Foundations Course
services.description: New to CrossFit? The Foundations program introduces you to core movements and equipment one step at a time, building the technique and confidence you need before joining regular classes.

services.title: Personal Training
services.description: One-on-one sessions tailored to your specific goals — whether you're easing into fitness, recovering from injury, or a sport-specific athlete looking for a competitive edge.

services.title: Free No-Sweat Intro
services.description: Not sure where to start? Book a free No-Sweat Intro to tour the facility, discuss your health and fitness goals, and leave with a clear next step — no workout required.

services.title: Nutrition & Habit Coaching
services.description: Sustainable results happen inside and outside the gym. Our coaches help you build healthy habits and daily systems that keep you on track between workouts.

services.title: Community & Accountability
services.description: At Workout Pro, members from all walks of life show up for each other. Our community-driven environment keeps you motivated, accountable, and coming back every week.

testimonials.name: Marcus T.
testimonials.quote: I walked in with zero fitness background and the coaches met me exactly where I was. Six months later I've dropped 30 pounds and I actually look forward to 5am classes.

testimonials.name: Rachel H.
testimonials.quote: The Foundations course was exactly what I needed. By the time I joined group classes I already knew the movements and felt confident. Best gym decision I've ever made.

testimonials.name: Derek W.
testimonials.quote: I've tried big-box gyms and never stuck with it. The community here is what's different. People genuinely cheer you on every single workout.

testimonials.name: Jenna L.
testimonials.quote: Personal training at Workout Pro helped me come back from a knee injury safely. My coach knew exactly how to scale every movement and kept me progressing the whole time.

team.name: Annie Lake
team.title: Co-Owner & Head Coach
team.bio: Annie co-founded Workout Pro alongside her husband Gordon to keep a tight-knit fitness community together under one roof. She brings warmth, accountability, and deep coaching expertise to every class she leads.

team.name: Gordon Lake
team.title: Co-Owner & Strength Coach
team.bio: Gordon's passion is teaching members the 'why' behind every movement. He believes understanding mechanics is the fastest path to long-term fitness and injury-free progress.

pricing.name: Foundations
features: Intro to all core CrossFit movements

faq.question: Do I need to be in shape before joining Workout Pro?
faq.answer: Not at all. Every workout is designed to be scaled to your current fitness level. Whether you're a complete beginner or a seasoned athlete, our coaches modify movements so you can train safely and effectively from day one.

faq.question: What happens at a free No-Sweat Intro?
faq.answer: A No-Sweat Intro is a no-obligation conversation with one of our coaches. You'll tour the facility, talk through your health and fitness goals, and walk away with a personalized plan — no workout required.

faq.question: How often should I come to classes each week?
faq.answer: For beginners, we recommend starting with 3 classes per week and working toward 4 to 5 over your first month or two. Your body needs recovery time between high-intensity sessions, and our coaches will help you find the right rhythm.

faq.question: What does a typical group class look like?
faq.answer: Each class runs 60 minutes and is fully coach-led. You'll start with a warm-up, review the Workout of the Day (WOD) with modification options, move through a skill-specific warm-up, complete the workout, and finish with a cool-down.

faq.question: Is personal training available if I'm not ready for group classes?
faq.answer: Yes. Personal training at Workout Pro is a great fit if you want one-on-one attention, are working around an injury, or are a sport-specific athlete with targeted performance goals. Your coach builds a plan around you specifically.

hero.headline: Simpsonville's CrossFit Gym for Every Fitness Level
hero.subheadline: Coach-led group classes, a Foundations course for beginners, and personal training — all inside a facility built specifically for Simpsonville members.

cta_banner.headline: Get Your First Class at Workout Pro Free
cta_banner.subheadline: Come see the community, meet the coaches, and take your first step toward becoming the best version of you.

stripe_payment.label: Pay for Membership or Sessions Online

footer.tagline: Workout Pro — Where Simpsonville shows up, pushes hard, and builds each other up.
